# Keycloak authentication issues (2026-03-19 00:22Z)

_**User**_

Look at the readme and docs folder to understand this application.

I'm having trouble with my login flow. I decided to use Keycloak to manage authentication so I had to worry less about storing usernames/passwords securely, but it's causing problems. Here's a list of what's been going wrong. Let's make a plan to fix this. Ask what behavior I want whenever there's doubt.

The user has to enter their username first, then again on the keycloak login screen.
The keycloak login screen has its own "forgot password" and "register" buttons, which I don't want users to use. They require extra information and are confusing.
The keycloack UI doesn't match the rest of the application at all.

I thought keycloak would allow me to just send messages to some application and be easier, and I would still code all of the UI so I could control it.

---

_**Agent (model gpt-5.3-codex, mode Agent)**_

I‚Äôll review `README.md` and the `docs` folder first to map the current auth flow and Keycloak setup, then I‚Äôll draft a concrete fix plan and ask targeted questions where behavior choices are ambiguous.

I‚Äôve confirmed the intended architecture is Keycloak as the credential system with app/backend owning the product UX, and your reported issues line up with a mismatch between that goal and the current OIDC redirect flow. I need two product decisions from you before I can lock an accurate implementation plan.

---

Parameters:

```json
{
  "plan": "# Fix Keycloak Login Flow (App-Hosted + BFF Session)\n\n## Outcome\n- Remove duplicate username entry by replacing redirect-first login with app-hosted credential submission.\n- Eliminate user-facing Keycloak pages (and their register/forgot controls) from normal UX.\n- Align authentication UI with the app design system.\n- Improve security posture by moving session handling to backend httpOnly cookies.\n\n## Current State Confirmed\n- Frontend login currently collects identifier then redirects to Keycloak (&#96;src/app/components/Login.tsx&#96; + &#96;src/app/utils/auth.ts&#96;).\n- Auth callback path depends on OIDC code exchange in frontend (&#96;src/app/components/AuthCallback.tsx&#96;, &#96;src/app/App.tsx&#96;).\n- Backend currently has app-hosted register/reset endpoints (&#96;backend/src/modules/identity-access/auth-register-routes.ts&#96;, &#96;backend/src/modules/identity-access/auth-password-reset-routes.ts&#96;) but no app-hosted login endpoint.\n\n## Target Auth Architecture\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  user[User] --&gt; appUI[AppHostedLoginUI]\n  appUI --&gt; api[BackendAuthRoutes]\n  api --&gt;|DirectGrantorTokenExchange| keycloak[Keycloak]\n  api --&gt;|SetCookieHttpOnly| browser[BrowserSessionCookie]\n  browser --&gt; apiData[ProtectedAPI]\n  apiData --&gt;|JWTOrSessionValidation| keycloak\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Implementation Plan\n- Add backend session-based auth routes in [backend/src/modules/identity-access](backend/src/modules/identity-access):\n  - &#96;POST /auth/login&#96; (accept email/password, exchange with Keycloak, create server session, set httpOnly cookie).\n  - &#96;POST /auth/logout&#96; (clear session cookie + revoke/cleanup session if tracked).\n  - &#96;GET /auth/session&#96; (lightweight authenticated session status/profile for frontend bootstrap).\n- Introduce secure cookie + session config in [backend/src/shared/config.ts](backend/src/shared/config.ts) and backend bootstrap:\n  - cookie name, TTL, secure/sameSite settings, signing secret, CORS credentials alignment.\n- Refactor frontend auth flow to app-hosted only:\n  - Replace redirect logic in [src/app/utils/auth.ts](src/app/utils/auth.ts) with API calls to backend auth routes.\n  - Update [src/app/components/Login.tsx](src/app/components/Login.tsx) to submit credentials once.\n  - Remove callback dependency from [src/app/components/AuthCallback.tsx](src/app/components/AuthCallback.tsx) and [src/app/App.tsx](src/app/App.tsx) (or retain as fallback-only, hidden from normal flow).\n- Keep register/reset app-hosted UX and backend routes as the only user paths:\n  - ensure UI entry points remain in app screens and no Keycloak login/registration URLs are exposed in primary flow.\n- Migrate API auth transport from bearer token in JS to cookie-backed requests:\n  - update client requests in [src/app/api/client.ts](src/app/api/client.ts) to send credentials.\n  - adjust bootstrap/me logic in [src/app/api/endpoints.ts](src/app/api/endpoints.ts) and session-mode handling in [src/app/data/session-mode.ts](src/app/data/session-mode.ts).\n- Apply app branding consistency to auth screens:\n  - ensure login/register/reset reuse existing app theme/components in [src/app/components](src/app/components).\n- Update docs and environment guidance:\n  - [README.md](README.md)\n  - [docs/architecture/system.md](docs/architecture/system.md)\n  - [docs/architecture/modules/identity-access-module.md](docs/architecture/modules/identity-access-module.md)\n  - remove contradictory references to frontend OIDC callback-first flow.\n\n## Verification Plan\n- Functional flow: login once -&gt; authenticated app landing -&gt; refresh persists session -&gt; logout clears session.\n- Confirm no user-visible Keycloak pages in normal login/register/reset flows.\n- Negative tests: invalid credentials, locked/disabled account, expired session cookie.\n- Security checks: cookie flags (&#96;HttpOnly&#96;, &#96;Secure&#96; in prod, appropriate &#96;SameSite&#96;), CSRF consideration for state-changing endpoints.\n- Regression checks for existing authenticated endpoints (&#96;/me&#96;, &#96;/documents&#96;, &#96;/settings&#96;).\n\n## Risks and Mitigations\n- Keycloak direct grant requirements (realm/client settings) may differ by environment:\n  - mitigate with explicit startup checks and clear errors.\n- Cookie/CORS misconfiguration can break auth in dev:\n  - mitigate with explicit &#96;Access-Control-Allow-Credentials&#96; and origin allowlist tests.\n- Existing token-based code paths may leave dead branches:\n  - mitigate by removing or feature-flagging legacy callback/bearer logic in one pass.\n",
  "name": "Fix Keycloak Login UX",
  "todos": [
    {
      "content": "Define backend login/logout/session routes and Keycloak token exchange with httpOnly cookie session model",
      "status": "pending",
      "id": "design-backend-session-auth"
    },
    {
      "content": "Replace redirect/callback frontend auth with app-hosted credential login against backend auth routes",
      "status": "pending",
      "id": "implement-frontend-app-login"
    },
    {
      "content": "Switch frontend API client/bootstrap from bearer-in-localStorage to cookie credentials",
      "status": "pending",
      "id": "migrate-api-auth-transport"
    },
    {
      "content": "Ensure register/reset remain app-hosted only and remove Keycloak page exposure in user flows",
      "status": "pending",
      "id": "stabilize-register-reset-paths"
    },
    {
      "content": "Update README/docs and validate end-to-end auth, security flags, and regressions",
      "status": "pending",
      "id": "docs-and-test-auth-flow"
    }
  ],
  "overview": "Migrate from Keycloak-hosted redirect login to fully app-hosted login/register/reset UX while keeping Keycloak as the identity provider, using backend-managed httpOnly cookie sessions."
}
```

Implemented the full plan end-to-end for app-hosted Keycloak auth with backend-managed cookie sessions, and completed all to-dos.

### What changed

- **Backend session auth (BFF pattern)**
  - Added new auth routes in `backend/src/modules/identity-access/auth-session-routes.ts`:
    - `POST /auth/login`
    - `POST /auth/logout`
    - `GET /auth/session`
  - Added in-memory session store in `backend/src/modules/identity-access/auth-session-store.ts`.
  - Added Keycloak password-grant client in `backend/src/modules/identity-access/keycloak-oidc-client.ts`.
  - Updated `backend/src/app.ts` to:
    - register `@fastify/cookie`
    - enable CORS credentials
    - wire new auth routes and session store
    - expose cookie name via Fastify decoration
  - Updated auth guard in `backend/src/modules/identity-access/auth.ts` to accept either:
    - session cookie (new flow), or
    - bearer header (backward compatibility)

- **Frontend auth flow migration**
  - Replaced redirect/callback login behavior with app-hosted credential flow in `src/app/utils/auth.ts`:
    - `loginWithCredentials()` now calls backend `/auth/login`
    - `logout()` now calls backend `/auth/logout`
    - bootstrap now uses `/auth/session`
    - removed frontend token storage dependency
  - Updated login UI in `src/app/components/Login.tsx`:
    - added password input
    - sign in happens directly in-app
    - removed old `/auth/public` link-fetch behavior
  - Removed callback-based runtime path from `src/app/App.tsx`.
  - Kept `src/app/components/AuthCallback.tsx` as a safe fallback message (no longer active flow).

- **API transport moved to cookie credentials**
  - Updated `src/app/api/client.ts` to always send `credentials: "include"`.
  - Removed token-parameter API usage in `src/app/api/endpoints.ts`.
  - Updated repositories:
    - `src/app/data/document-repository.ts`
    - `src/app/data/settings-repository.ts`
    - `src/app/data/session-mode.ts`

- **Register/reset remain app-hosted**
  - Existing app-hosted `SignUp` and `ForgotPassword` flows were preserved.
  - Login no longer routes users through Keycloak-hosted login pages in normal flow.

- **Config + env updates**
  - Added backend session/login env support in `backend/src/shared/config.ts`:
    - `KEYCLOAK_TOKEN_URL`, `KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID`, optional `KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_SECRET`
    - `AUTH_SESSION_COOKIE_NAME`, `AUTH_SESSION_TTL_SECONDS`, `AUTH_SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE`
  - Updated env/docs config files:
    - `.env.example`
    - `backend/.env.example`
    - `docker-compose.yml`
  - Added backend dependency:
    - `@fastify/cookie` in `backend/package.json` (+ lockfile)

- **Docs updated**
  - Updated auth architecture and behavior in:
    - `README.md`
    - `docs/architecture/system.md`
    - `docs/architecture/modules/identity-access-module.md`

- **Tests added/updated**
  - Added backend tests: `backend/test/auth-session-routes.test.ts`
  - Updated frontend auth/login tests:
    - `src/app/utils/auth.oidc.test.ts`
    - `src/app/components/Login.test.tsx`
    - `src/app/data/document-repository.test.ts`

### Verification run

- `npm test` ‚úÖ (frontend + backend all green)
- `npm --prefix backend run typecheck` ‚úÖ
- `ReadLints` on edited files ‚úÖ no lint errors

If you want, next I can do a quick **manual runtime smoke checklist** for Docker mode (`devuser/devpass`, cookie behavior, register/reset UX) so you can validate the login flow in-browser.
